reviews.comment:
Siempre igual esta estación con los años ni peor ni mejor, lo cual no es poco en Argentina, los Baños siempre limpios!!!!

(Translated by Google)
This season is always the same, neither worse nor better over the years, which is no small feat in Argentina. The bathrooms are always clean!

reviews.comment:
Siendo socia no me dejaron entrar al baño. Mala atención de la empleda del full. Para darme un termo de agua me retuvieron el carnet y me mandaron a un baño en el exterior que ni siquiera cierra la puerta. De noche no se puede visualizar el controlador de aire. Buena atención de los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
As a member, I wasn't allowed in the bathroom. The staff at the resort was terrible. To give me a thermos of water, they took my ID and sent me to an outside bathroom that didn't even lock the door. The air conditioning control panel isn't visible at night. The beach attendants were very attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXMXJfR1VnEAE
